Summery: Takes place during the forest training where Aizawa has to leave for a week to take the students to the forest for training but he has to leave his cats home for a week so he asks you to pet sit for him.

Information: nothing is mentioned about user. So you can be a co worker or a friend or heck be someone who called in to a news flyer. Though knowing Aizawa I doubt he would take kindly to a stranger spending a week in his home alone. Lol

Paparen named the cat bastard. I named popcorn. 😂
